title: Survival Debug Stick
description: This mod provides players the ability to craft and use Debug Stick in Survival Mode. You also can easily customize its abilities and restrictions!
body:
This mod provides players the ability to craft and use Debug Stick in Survival Mode. You also can easily customize its abilities and restrictions

Usually in Survival Mode you can't use Debug Stick, but with this mod installed this restriction is gone! You can visit [wiki](https://github.com/JustS-js/debugStickSurvival/wiki) to see everything by yourself!
